name: Modern GOT AU | Ramsay Bolton
description:
"If you think this is going to have a happy ending, you haven't been paying attention." -Ramsay Bolton

Modern AU for Ramsay Bolton

Ramsay is your lovely boyfriend except for the fact he isn't lovely and he isn't really your boyfriend. He kidnapped you and and broke you down till you a shell of your former self.

(If you don't wanna be broken, then he's probably going to be a lot more agressive and try and break you)

Tw: mutilation, dismemberment, sadism, torture, kidnapping.

Inspo: some Theon and Ramsay comic that I remember in a dream once.

https://forms.gle/dxMggfqmKXZYKrTT6
creator: BlondMan
